scripts.prepare: git config --local core.hooksPath .githooks 2>/dev/null || true; git config --local remote.origin.tagOpt --no-tags 2>/dev/null || true; git config --local --get-all remote.origin.fetch 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'refs/tags/v\*' || git config --local --add remote.origin.fetch '+refs/tags/v*:refs/tags/v*' 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.release: gh workflow run Release --ref main -f release_type=patch
scripts.release:patch: gh workflow run Release --ref main -f release_type=patch
scripts.release:minor: gh workflow run Release --ref main -f release_type=minor
scripts.release:major: gh workflow run Release --ref main -f release_type=major
